title: Restructure the learning path
objective: Repair sequencing and duplication while preserving the strongest existing material.
acceptanceCriteria: Foundations, Architecture, Pre-Training, Post-Training, Inference, Applications, and Advanced tracks have explicit roles
Optimizers, RL Fundamentals, and RLHF are moved to pedagogically correct tracks
The architecture RLHF overview is reframed as a non-duplicative bridge
All lesson numbers and prerequisites form a coherent path
details: Update tracks, lesson placement, numbering, prerequisite ordering, navigation copy, and audit documentation.

title: Add true-beginner foundations
objective: Teach the mathematical and neural-network prerequisites currently assumed by the architecture lessons.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tensors/matrix operations, probability/softmax/loss, and gradients/backprop lessons
Every new lesson includes complete teaching schema and active calculation or manipulation
Architecture prerequisites point through the new foundations
details: Add three foundation lessons and interactive tensor, softmax, and gradient labs; position Optimizers as the fourth foundation lesson.

title: Add inference and deployment
objective: Teach how trained weights become efficient, controllable production generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add decoding, generation/KV cache, quantization, serving, and test-time compute lessons
Labs expose probability truncation, KV memory, precision trade-offs, batching, and compute budgets
Lessons distinguish latency, throughput, memory, quality, and cost
details: Create five complete lessons, interactive labs, sources, and prerequisite links.

title: Add applications, reliability, and modern extensions
objective: Cover the missing work of building, evaluating, securing, and understanding LLM systems.
acceptanceCriteria: Add context engineering, RAG, agents, evaluation, security, and observability lessons
Each lesson includes a relevant diagnostic or design interaction
Safety and runtime authorization are treated as system properties, not weight-only behavior
details: Add eight complete lessons and relevant labs/sources across Applications and Advanced tracks.

title: Deepen interactions and final skeptical audit
objective: Make the expanded course coherent, active, accessible, and free of curriculum gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated tests validate all lessons and the expanded teaching schema
Home and navigation accurately describe the expanded course
Every new lab states change/observe/limits and works responsively
Build, lint, tests, dependency audit, and final curriculum audit pass
details: Strengthen tests and UI counts, run full verification, resolve gaps, and update grading/audit evidence.
